reachability.evidence: cmd/sworn/llmcheck_test.go:TestSpecAmbiguityTypedReferencesBinaryReachability builds and invokes sworn llm-check spec-ambiguity over real typed file, slice, and contract references; TestGenericCheckIdentityBinaryReachability and TestGenericMaintainabilityReviewRetiredWithoutDispatch exercise the built CLI fail-closed paths; internal/mcp/lint_test.go covers the registered MCP paths.

delivered.item: AC-01: dedicated spec-ambiguity resolves C-02 typed references and pairs PASS with exit 0.
AC-02: unsafe resolution failures stop before dispatch and safe unresolved reasons are deterministic.
AC-03: duplicate, cross-schema, overlapping-fingerprint, and inconsistent ambiguity reports fail closed.
AC-04: generic emitted check identities must equal the requested identity before a PASS is trusted.
AC-05: generic maintainability-review is retired before dispatch or mutation on gate, CLI, and MCP paths.
